name: Aquila Resources Limited
description: Aquila Resources Limited is an Australian-based mining and exploration company. The company's primary focus is on the exploration and development of coal, iron ore, and manganese projects. Its key assets include the Eagle Downs Hard Coking Coal Project in Queensland, the West Pilbara Iron Ore Project in Western Australia, and the Thabazimbi Iron Ore Project in South Africa. Aquila Resources was acquired by Baosteel Resources and Aurizon Operations in 2014 and subsequently delisted from the Australian Securities Exchange.
